# netbox_manufacturer (Data Source)

Fetches a single manufacturer from Netbox by ID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the manufacturer.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description for the manufacturer.
- `name` (String) Name of the manufacturer.
- `slug` (String) URL-friendly unique shorthand for the manufacturer.
